description: The UserLoginManager component is used to handle the user's login status.

fields.IsLoggedIn: Whether the current user is logged in or not.
fields.IsLoggingOut: Whether the local user is currently logging out or not.
fields.CurrentUsername: The username of the local user.
fields.CurrentUserId: The user ID of the local user.
fields.CurrentAccountType: The account type of the local user (patreon status or team member likewise)
fields.CurrentAccountColorOverride: The current user color override of the local user. Like nametag colors.
fields.CurrentProfileIcon: The user icon of the local user.
fields.LoginLogoutButton: Only works in userspace. Is the button for logging in or out.
